Our Mission & Culture

At Acme Corp, we believe in building a world where technology serves humanity. Our culture is one of radical candor, psychological safety, and continuous learning. We celebrate diversity and are proud to be an equal-opportunity employer. Join us in our mission to make the world a better place through innovation.

We offer unlimited PTO, comprehensive health benefits, a 401k match up to 6%, remote-first work environment, and monthly team retreats.

Acme Corp is committed to creating a diverse environment and is proud to be an equal opportunity employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, gender, gender identity, sexual orientation, national origin, genetics, disability, age, or veteran status.

Senior Backend Engineer

Location: San Francisco, CA (Hybrid 3 days/week)

Department: Platform Engineering

Role Overview

We are looking for a Senior Backend Engineer to join our Platform Engineering team. You will design, build, and operate distributed systems that process over 5 million events per day with 99.9% uptime SLA.

Required Qualifications

  • 5+ years of professional software engineering experience
  • Strong proficiency in Python (3.10+) or Go
  • Experience designing and operating distributed systems at scale (1M+ RPS)
  • Hands-on experience with PostgreSQL, including query optimization and indexing
  • Deep knowledge of REST API design and gRPC
  • Experience with containerization (Docker) and Kubernetes orchestration
  • Proficiency with Google Cloud Platform (GCP) or AWS
  • Strong understanding of asynchronous programming (asyncio, Celery, or equivalent)
  • Experience with CI/CD pipelines (GitHub Actions, Jenkins, or equivalent)

Preferred Qualifications

  • Experience with Apache Kafka or Google Pub/Sub for event streaming
  • Familiarity with Terraform for infrastructure-as-code
  • Contributions to open-source projects
  • Experience with large language model (LLM) APIs and RAG pipelines
  • Knowledge of observability tooling (Datadog, Prometheus, Grafana)

Key Responsibilities

  • Design and implement scalable microservices handling 1M+ daily active users
  • Reduce p99 API latency from current 800ms to under 200ms through profiling and optimization
  • Lead architecture reviews and mentor 2-3 junior engineers per quarter
  • Maintain 99.9% uptime for core platform services
  • Drive incident response and post-mortems to root cause within 24 hours
